summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that TJX is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $158.02. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 26.9%. The asset has recently tested this support 4 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $162.21 and a significant trendline confluence around $161.55 (formed by 15 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
